default.title: Horizon Tech | Polokalama fakakomipiuta fakapisinisi, ʻAo, mo e AI
default.description: ʻOku fokotuʻutuʻu mo ʻoatu ʻe he Horizon Tech ʻa e polokalama fakakomipiuta, ngaahi founga ʻo e AI, faʻunga ʻao, mo e ngaahi koloa fakaʻilekitulonika maʻa e ngaahi timi fie maʻu.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Ngaahi Founga Fakaʻenisinia ʻOku Fua
home.description: Enterprise software, AI/ML, cloud infrastructure, and IoT delivery for global teams.

about.title: Fekauʻaki mo e Horizon Tech | Misiona mo e Timi ʻa e Kautaha
about.description: Ako fekauʻaki mo e Horizon Tech, ʻetau misiona, mo e founga ʻoku tau ʻoatu ai ʻa e ngaahi founga fakatekinolosia ʻoku ʻaonga maʻolunga.

team.title: Timi | Horizon Tech Leadership and Experts
team.description: Feʻiloaki mo e kau ʻenisinia mo e kau taki ʻoku nau langa ʻa e polokalama fakakomipiuta mo e ngaahi platform ʻao ʻi he Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Ngaahi ngaue maʻuʻanga moʻui | Langa mo e Horizon Tech
careers.description: Vakaiʻi ʻa e ngaahi fatongia ʻoku ʻata pea fakatupulaki hoʻo ngaue maʻuʻanga moʻui mo e timi ʻenisinia ʻa e Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Fetuʻutaki ki he Horizon Tech | Kamata Hoʻo Ngāué
contact.description: Fetuʻutaki ki he Horizon Tech ke aleaʻi hoʻo ngaue, ngaahi fie maʻu fakatekinikale, mo e taimi ʻoku ʻave ai.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Ola ʻo e Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Lau ʻa e ngaahi meʻa ke ako mei ai ʻa e kasitomaa mo e ngaahi ola ʻoku ʻomi ʻe he Horizon Tech ʻi he ngaahi ngaueʻanga.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Ngaahi fakakaukau fakatekinikale, ngaahi lesoni mo e fakahinohino ki he langa fale mei he Horizon Tech.

education.title: Ako | Ngaahi Maʻuʻanga Tokoni Fakaako ʻa e Horizon Tech
education.description: Ngaahi fakahinohino, ngaahi fakamoʻoni fakafolofola, mo e ngaahi maʻuʻanga tokoni fakatekinikale ki he ako mei he Horizon Tech.

support.title: Poupou | Horizon Tech
support.description: Maʻu ha ngaahi maʻuʻanga tokoni tokoni mo ha ngaahi founga fetuʻutaki ki he ngaahi ngaue ʻa e Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Tuʻutuʻuni Totonu Fakatautaha | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Lau ʻa e tuʻutuʻuni totonu fakatautaha ʻa e Horizon Tech mo e ngaahi tukupa ki he maluʻi ʻo e fakamatala.

terms.title: Ngaahi Tuʻutuʻuni ʻo e Ngaue | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Lau ʻa e ngaahi tuʻutuʻuni ngaue ʻa e Horizon Tech ki heʻemau uepisaiti mo e ngaahi ngaue.

profile.title: Fakamatala fakafoʻituitui | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Tokangaʻi hoʻo fakamatala fakafoʻituitui, fokotuʻutuʻu, mo e fakaikiiki ʻo e ʻakauni ʻi he Horizon Tech.

firstTimeSetup.title: ʻUluaki Fokotuʻutuʻu | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Fakakakato ʻa e fuofua fokotuʻutuʻu ʻo e ʻakauni ke hoko atu ʻi he Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Ngalo ʻa e lea fufuu | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Fakafoʻou ʻa e hu ki hoʻo ʻakauni Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Fakafoʻou ʻa e Lea Fufuu | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Faʻu ha lea fufu foʻou ki hoʻo ʻakauni Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Fakapapauʻi ʻa e ʻImeili | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Fakapapauʻi ho tuʻasila ʻimeili ke fakamoʻui hoʻo ʻakauni Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Penolo Pule | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Feituʻu ngaue fakapule ki hono puleʻi ʻo e Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Fakamafaiʻi | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: ʻOku ʻikai ke ke lava ʻo hu ki he peesi ko ʻeni ʻo e Horizon Tech.

services.title: Ngaahi Ngaue | Horizon Tech
services.description: Vakaiʻi ʻa e ngaahi tokoni ʻa e Horizon Tech ʻi he polokalama fakakomipiuta, AI, ʻao, DevOps, mo e liliu fakaʻilekitulonika.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Vakai ki he ngaahi ʻahiʻahi mo e prototypes ʻo e Horizon Tech ʻi he AI mo e ʻenisinia fakaʻaongaʻi.

authCallback.title: Hu ki he Hu | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Fakakakato ʻa e hu malu ki hoʻo ʻakauni Horizon Tech.
